metadata.name: Lubrication Library
metadata.description: Typical friction ranges, usage notes and OEM compatibility for eight lubrication conditions (Faz 2.4.1), plus 15 Tablo 9.4 surface/lubrication-state combined-friction reference records (Faz 2.6.0, textbook_reference/reference_only).
metadata.primary_source: ISO 16047 (friction test methodology); all records reference_only.

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: Baseline reference condition

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: Assembly of pre-oiled powertrain fasteners

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: High-load, reusable joints

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: General purpose, corrosion protection

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: Low-friction, high-repeatability joints

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: High-temperature service

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: High-temperature, anti-galling

records.notes: Typical friction range for the named lubrication condition -- reference_only. Joint-specific torque-tension testing per ISO 16047 must govern production use; this record is not that test report.
records.source: ISO 16047 (typical range, not a test report)
records.application: Stainless/aluminium joints, dissimilar metals

records.notes: Faz 2.6.0: Tablo 9.4 kaynakli, tek toplam surtunme katsayisi araligi (thread/bearing ayrimi yok). Uretimde kullanilmadan once ISO 16047 tork-on yuk testi ile dogrulanmalidir.
records.source: Makine Elemanlari (ders kitabi), Tablo 9.4 - Surtunme Katsayilari icin Yaklasik Degerler
records.application: Somun dayanma yuzeyi surtunme katsayisi referansi (Tablo 9.4)
records.source_reference: Makine Elemanlari (ders kitabi), Tablo 9.4 - Surtunme Katsayilari icin Yaklasik Degerler
records.source_page_or_table: s. 211, Tablo 9.4 (bkz. Sekil 9.23 Somun Dayanma Yuzeyi baglami)
records.applicability: Somun dayanma yuzeyi (bearing surface) sürtünmesi baglaminda verilmis genel civata/somun yuzey durumu referans degeri; belirli bir civata capi, siniflandirma veya yag markasina ozel degildir.

records.regulatory_warning: Kadmiyum kaplama modern seri uretim otomotiv uygulamalarinda RoHS/ELV ve benzeri mevzuat ile musteri OEM sartlarina bagli olarak kisitli veya yasaklidir. Bu kayit yalnizca tarihsel/referans muhendislik degeri tasir; yeni bir tasarimda kullanilmadan once mevzuat ve musteri onayi ayrica dogrulanmalidir. Kesin mevzuat hukmu bu fazda belirtilmemistir (bkz. Faz 2.6.2 veri dogrulama fazi).
